description: Shave biopsy of skin, single lesion
rationale: The note explicitly states 'Shave biopsy of the lesion was performed' for the lesion on the cheek (Verruca vulgaris versus SCC).
official_description: CPT code 11102 is for a tangential biopsy of a single skin lesion, used by healthcare providers for billing and documentation purposes.

description: Shave biopsy of skin, each additional lesion
rationale: The note documents a second, separate biopsy: 'Irritated nevus on right mandible. Shave biopsy of the lesion was performed.'
official_description: CPT code 11103 is for a tangential biopsy of the skin, each separate or additional lesion.
